overall.description: A slow first-person exploration of a luxurious modernist courtyard at night in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves through a landscaped garden featuring an infinity pool, tropical palm trees, and dramatic uplighting, with a towering corporate structure visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury residential courtyard with infinity pool

agents.ego_description: slowly walking forward through the landscaped courtyard, approaching the modernist villa while observing the illuminated pool and garden features

entered.detail: low-rise luxury residence with extensive glass walls and warm interior lighting visible through windows
rectangular reflecting pool with calm water surface catching the ambient light
tall palm tree silhouetted against the night sky
warm-toned ground lights illuminating bushes and architectural features
large decorative boulder surrounded by illuminated shrubbery

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a tranquil luxury courtyard at night, featuring a modernist villa ahead and an infinity pool to the left. Warm landscape lighting creates dramatic accents on the tropical vegetation and rock formations as the camera moves slowly forward through the paved garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to modernist villa entrance with city backdrop

events.description: tall corporate tower with neon lighting becomes visible on the left horizon as the camera advances past the pool area

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward toward the villa entrance, passing the rock formation while the urban skyline reveals itself to the left

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with red and white aviation lights visible against the night sky
stone pathway leading to the main entrance of the villa

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves past the pool area, the infinity pool exits the frame left and a towering corporate skyscraper becomes visible in the distance. The perspective shifts to focus on the villa entrance pathway while the zen rock formation moves to the left foreground and the palm tree grows larger on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward glide through a tranquil luxury courtyard that gradually reveals the imposing scale of a distant corporate skyline. It begins amidst a modernist villa and a glowing infinity pool, moving slowly across a paved garden where warm landscape lighting accents tropical vegetation and rock formations. As the camera advances, the pool slides out of frame to the left, allowing a towering skyscraper to emerge in the distance. The perspective then shifts toward the villa's entrance pathway, with a zen rock formation drifting into the left foreground while a palm tree looms larger on the right.
